meaning: adj.英俊的,大方的,慷慨的,美观的,堂皇的
examples: He was tall, lean and handsome.
"He used to be so handsome."—"And now?"
He was handsome, upright, and chivalrous.
Farmer hired college-educated managers and built a sales organization that paid drivers and salesmen handsome commissions.
He and Nicole Brown, whom he married in 1985, played the perfect, handsome couple.
